name: Erewhon System
license: Text adapted from the Honorverse Wiki (Fandom), CC BY-SA.

location.notes: Canon: Erewhon lies to the galactic east of Manticore and south of Haven (HH1, HH3); no precise distance is given. Distance (250 ly), bearing, and bearing_offset_deg are fabricated (canon:false), placed east of Manticore and below Haven (which is north-east) to match the relative description.

stars.name: Erewhon
stars.notes: The system's main body is a K5 star (canon, CS3). Mass not stated; would be inferred from the K5 classification if needed (canon:false).

bodies.name: Erewhon
bodies.lore: The capital world of the Republic of Erewhon — a wealthy, fiercely independent single-system republic founded by organized-crime families gone legitimate, renowned for its shipyards. Controls the Erewhon Wormhole Junction.

orbit.notes: Fabricated by orbit-derive (canon:false): geometric spacing; star mass 0.75 M_sun (mass fabricated from spectral class).

places.name: Erewhon Wormhole Junction
places.lore: The Erewhon Wormhole Junction originates in this system (host of the junction); its termini reach Phoenix (Terra Haute), Joshua, and Sasebo. The junction is the basis of Erewhon's commercial importance.

position.notes: In-system nexus position not specified; the engine/UI fabricate it from the junction host.

demographics.notes: Population not captured in this pass.

lore.summary: A K5 single-star system in the galactic east of Manticore and south of Haven, governed by the Republic of Erewhon. Home of the Erewhon Wormhole Junction and first-rate shipyards; a member of the Manticoran Alliance.
lore.naming_convention: Named for Samuel Butler's satirical 'Erewhon' (an anagram of 'nowhere').

coordinates.notes: Fabricated (canon:false) from canon distance+bearing relative to manticore; Sol origin, +Z galactic north, +X galactic east.
